---
id: list-post-reactions
title: "List who reacted to a post, and with what"
description: "The full reactor list, newest first — unlike `Post.recentReactors`"
sidebar_label: "List who reacted to a post, and with what"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: developers/api-reference/famlin-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List who reacted to a post, and with what"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/posts/{postId}/reactions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



The full reactor list, newest first — unlike `Post.recentReactors`
(capped at 3, no `type`), this is every reactor plus which emoji they
left.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
